name: git-hooks
description:
Pre-commit (lintŌåÆtscŌåÆfast tests) and pre-push (build) git hooks. Uses git's native core.hooksPath (no husky dep). Pattern source: LuxeBook .git/hooks/pre-commit + pre-push (~/.claude/hooks).

The `prepare` npm lifecycle script (auto-runs after install) wires `.githooks/` as the hook dir for the repo. Bypass for incidents: `git commit --no-verify`.
